description: bug: eval_exists NxDomain not counting void lookup (RFC 7208 §4.6.4)
bug: ARC oldest_pass=0 when all AMS pass — should be 1 per RFC 8617 §5.3
bug: ARC oldest_pass=1 should be 0 per RFC 8617 §5.2(5)(B); DKIM x= must be >= t= per RFC 6376 §3.5
bug: DMARC p=reject outside pct sample must downgrade to quarantine per RFC 7489 §6.6.4
bug: SPF include→None must return PermError per RFC 7208 §5.2 (was treating as no-match)
bug: SPF mx mechanism with >10 MX records must return PermError per RFC 7208 §4.6.4 (was silently truncating)
